title: Two Sum
summary: Find two numbers in an array that add up to a given target and return their indices.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
summary: Find the maximum profit from a single buy-sell transaction in a price array.

title: Contains Duplicate
summary: Determine if any value appears at least twice in an integer array.

title: Move Zeroes
summary: Move all zeroes to the end of an array while maintaining order of non-zero elements.

title: Running Sum of 1d Array
summary: Compute the running (prefix) sum of an integer array.

title: Shuffle the Array
summary: Interleave two halves of an array to produce a shuffled result.

title: Kids With the Greatest Number of Candies
summary: Determine which kids can have the greatest candies after a boost.

title: Richest Customer Wealth
summary: Find the wealth of the richest customer given a matrix of bank accounts.

title: Number of Good Pairs
summary: Count pairs (i,j) where nums[i]==nums[j] and i<j.

title: Concatenation of Array
summary: Return the concatenation of an array with itself.

title: Left and Right Sum Differences
summary: Return an array of absolute differences between left and right prefix sums.

title: Find the Highest Altitude
summary: Find the highest altitude reached given a list of altitude gains.

title: Find Pivot Index
summary: Find the index where the sum of left elements equals the sum of right elements.

title: Maximum Average Subarray I
summary: Find the contiguous subarray of length k with the maximum average.

title: Sort Array by Parity
summary: Move all even integers to the front of the array.

title: Third Maximum Number
summary: Return the third distinct maximum; if it doesn't exist return the maximum.

title: Find All Numbers Disappeared
summary: Find all numbers missing from an array of range [1,n].

title: Squares of a Sorted Array
summary: Return sorted array of squares of a sorted integer array.

title: Intersection of Two Arrays
summary: Return the intersection (unique) of two arrays.

title: Plus One
summary: Increment a large integer represented as an array of digits by one.

title: Reverse String
summary: Reverse a character array in-place using two pointers.

title: Valid Palindrome
summary: Check if a string is a palindrome ignoring non-alphanumeric characters.

title: Longest Common Prefix
summary: Find the longest common prefix string among an array of strings.

title: Reverse Words in a String III
summary: Reverse the characters in each word of a sentence.

title: Count and Say
summary: Generate the nth term of the count-and-say sequence.

title: Valid Anagram
summary: Determine if two strings are anagrams of each other.

title: First Unique Character in a String
summary: Find the first non-repeating character in a string and return its index.

title: Roman to Integer
summary: Convert a Roman numeral string to its integer representation.

title: Implement strStr()
summary: Return the index of the first occurrence of needle in haystack.

title: Palindrome Number
summary: Determine whether an integer is a palindrome without converting to string.

title: Reverse Linked List
summary: Reverse a singly linked list iteratively or recursively.

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
summary: Merge two sorted linked lists and return the merged sorted list.

title: Linked List Cycle
summary: Detect if a linked list has a cycle using fast and slow pointers.

title: Middle of the Linked List
summary: Find the middle node of a linked list using two pointers.

title: Remove Linked List Elements
summary: Remove all elements from a linked list with a given value.

title: Delete Node in a Linked List
summary: Delete a node in a linked list given only access to that node.

title: Palindrome Linked List
summary: Check whether a linked list is a palindrome in O(n) time.

title: Intersection of Two Linked Lists
summary: Find the node at which two linked lists intersect.

title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
summary: Find the maximum depth (height) of a binary tree.

title: Symmetric Tree
summary: Check whether a binary tree is a mirror of itself.

title: Invert Binary Tree
summary: Invert a binary tree (mirror it).

title: Path Sum
summary: Determine if the tree has a root-to-leaf path summing to a target.

title: Same Tree
summary: Check if two binary trees are identical in structure and values.

title: Count Complete Tree Nodes
summary: Count nodes in a complete binary tree more efficiently than O(n).

title: Diameter of Binary Tree
summary: Find the length of the longest path between any two nodes.

title: Valid Parentheses
summary: Check if a string of brackets is valid using a stack.

title: Implement Queue using Stacks
summary: Implement a FIFO queue using only two stacks.

title: Min Stack
summary: Design a stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum in O(1).

title: Majority Element
summary: Find the element that appears more than n/2 times in an array.

title: Missing Number
summary: Find the missing number in a range [0,n] array.

title: Single Number
summary: Find the element that appears only once when all others appear twice.

title: Power of Two
summary: Determine if a given integer is a power of two.

title: Fizz Buzz
summary: Print numbers 1 to n replacing multiples of 3 and 5 with FizzBuzz.

summary: Reverse digits of a 32-bit signed integer, returning 0 on overflow.

title: Climbing Stairs
summary: Count distinct ways to climb n stairs taking 1 or 2 steps at a time.

title: Pascal's Triangle
